name: Nabla
description: Ambient AI scribe and clinical documentation platform with an API for integrating AI note generation into EHR workflows.

seo.title: Nabla — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Nabla: Ambient AI scribe and clinical documentation platform with an API for integrating AI note generation into EHR workflows.

when_to_use: Generating SOAP notes from doctor-patient conversations automatically
Reducing clinical documentation burden with ambient AI scribe
Integrating ambient AI documentation into EHR/EMR workflows
Running HIPAA-compliant medical transcription for telehealth

cons: Requires legal review for patient-data handling
Priced per clinician, not per API call
review.verdict: A mature medical-scribe API if you ship clinician-facing software; overkill for generic speech-to-text use cases.
review.best_for: EHR vendors and digital health startups serving clinicians
review.not_for: General-purpose transcription or non-medical voice apps
